name: Sour Cream Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 hard boiled eggs, yolks only 1/2 pint sour cream
2 spring onions, chopped 3 tablespoons vinegar (to taste)
1 tablespoon sugar 1 teaspoon red pepper or paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the egg yolks in a bowl.
2. Add salt, mustard, and sugar to the yolks, mixing well.
3. Stir in the chopped red pepper or paprika.
4. Slowly add sour cream until the mixture is thick and soupy.
5. Gently fold in the chopped spring onions.
6. Serve over Spring leaf lettuce.
Mrs. Brice McAdoo Clagett
